name: word-circles.public.dappnode.eth
description: Rust/Axum backend for the Word Circles game. Handles daily game creation, guess evaluation, and persistence via PostgreSQL.
author: bh2smith

fields.title: Resolver Private Key
fields.description: Hex-encoded private key for the resolver wallet (signs commitments and settlements on-chain)

fields.title: WordCommitment Contract Address
fields.description: Deployed WordCommitment contract address on Gnosis

fields.title: WordCircleStats Contract Address
fields.description: Deployed WordCircleStats contract address on Gnosis

fields.title: WordCirclesEscrow Contract Address
fields.description: Deployed WordCirclesEscrow contract address on Gnosis. Change here (a reconfigure, no republish) if the escrow is redeployed — but note the indexer's rindexer.yaml is baked into the indexer image, so an address change there requires a package rebuild + republish.

fields.title: Database URL
fields.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Defaults to the bundled postgres container.

fields.title: Enable PvP Mode
fields.description: Enable PvP matchmaking, escrow games, and related endpoints (requires resolver wallet + the PvP token/amount below)

fields.title: PvP Stake Token
fields.description: Address of the Circles ERC20 (inflation) token players stake to join a PvP game. Required when PvP is enabled.

fields.title: PvP Stake Amount (wei)
fields.description: Per-player stake in wei (18 decimals). Default is 1 token (1e18).

fields.title: PvP Players Per Game
fields.description: Number of players per PvP game (escrow lobby capacity). Must be >= 2.

fields.title: Enable PvP Bot
fields.description: Run a matchmaking bot that fills lonely lobbies so a solo player can always find a match. Requires PvP enabled and the bot Safe below funded with the stake token.

fields.title: Bot Circles Account (Safe)
fields.description: Address of the Circles account (Safe) the bot plays as. Must hold the PvP stake token. Required when the bot is enabled.

fields.title: Bot Owner Private Key
fields.description: Hex-encoded private key of an owner/signer EOA of the bot's Safe. Required when the bot is enabled.
